MINI MINUTES: 10:10am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record: Cause called for small claims appeal. Defendant, Valencia Auto Wholesale, inc., appears in Pro Per through Fooad Laghaer; Respondent, Kylar Bryan, appears in Pro Per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative. Appearing as a witness for Appellant is Jacob Shikh, previously sworn. No new evidence is identified or admitted.
